courses_dates_chk.name: courses_dates_chk
courses_dates_chk.value: "courses"."start_date" IS NULL OR "courses"."end_date" IS NULL OR "courses"."start_date" <= "courses"."end_date"

projects_dates_chk.name: projects_dates_chk
projects_dates_chk.value: "projects"."start_date" IS NULL OR "projects"."target_date" IS NULL OR "projects"."start_date" <= "projects"."target_date"

recurrence_rules_days_of_week_chk.name: recurrence_rules_days_of_week_chk
recurrence_rules_days_of_week_chk.value:
"recurrence_rules"."days_of_week" IS NULL OR (
        0 <= ALL("recurrence_rules"."days_of_week")
        AND 6 >= ALL("recurrence_rules"."days_of_week")
        AND array_is_sorted_asc_unique("recurrence_rules"."days_of_week")
      )
